role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of visible text and remained within the linguistic domain by noting the lack of script evidence.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Analyzed terrain, vegetation, and climate cues (pampas, eucalyptus/pine) consistent with the landscape role.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Focused on plant species (Pinus, pampas grass) and land-use patterns, staying within the botanics domain.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed road infrastructure (bollards, lines, signage) and driving standards, fitting the regulatory role.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain features (specifically the bollard design) to distinguish between candidates, fitting the meta role.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified Uruguay. The specialists provided grounded, image-consistent evidence, particularly regarding the unique bollard style and landscape. The tournament successfully used this evidence to distinguish Uruguay from its closest neighbor, Argentina.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of rolling grasslands and tree lines match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Descriptions of scrub and plantations match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Descriptions of bollards and road markings match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Descriptions of bollard shape match the image.
